data.title: FIA's UAOA Campaign funds 5th scholar for research program, fighting online abuse.
data.description: In London, the United Against Online Abuse (UAOA) Campaign by the FIA has announced the addition of the 5th scholar to its primary scholarship program.

data.title: Polymarket to utilize in-house market maker for trading against users amid US expansion, as rival Kalshi faces scrutiny. #news #finance
data.description: A company has reached out to traders, including individuals who engage in sports betting, to recruit them for its expansion in the US. This move comes as a rival company, Kalshi, is being investigated for comparable activities.

data.title: SciBase releases document for repurchasing all series TO 2 warrants; offer announced on 7 November.
data.description: Stockholm, December 5, 2025 - SciBase Holding AB (publ) released an informational document regarding the repurchase offer for all current warrants of series TO 2 in SciBase. The TO 2 Offer was first introduced by SciBase on November 7. The company is encouraging shareholders to take advantage of this opportunity to sell their warrants back to SciBase. This move is in line with the company's strategic plans and aims to streamline operations. SciBase has not disclosed the exact number of warrants being repurchased, but this initiative is an important step in the company's growth strategy.

data.title: Hydron Energy named in Foresight Canada's Top 50 Investable Clean Tech Companies for 2025. Major recognition for the company.
data.description: In North Vancouver, British Columbia, on December 5, 2025, Hydron Energy, a prominent company specializing in renewable gas upgrading and clean fuel solutions, was named one of the Top 50 Investable Clean Tech Companies by Foresight Canada for 2025. This acknowledgment showcases the company's position among the top players in the industry and marks a significant achievement for Hydron.

data.title: SentinelOne's Q3 saw solid results but Q4 outlook is softer due to seasonality. ARR at $1.055 billion, 23% growth YoY. Buy rating maintained.
data.description: SentinelOne Inc's (NYSE: S) fiscal third-quarter results were praised for "solid execution," but the fourth-quarter outlook is affected by significant seasonality, uncertain macro conditions, and deal timing. Needham's analyst Mike Cikos maintained a Buy rating but reduced the price target from $23 to $21. The company's Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) stood at $1.055 billion, surpassing the expected $1.051 billion, and marked a 23% year-on-year growth compared to the previous quarter's 22%. For more details, a detailed report is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Oil prices rise; Domo shares fall. U.S. stocks up, Nasdaq gains 0.2%. Dow at 47,933.71, Nasdaq at 23,543.03, S&P 500 at 6,867.40. Communication services up 0.9%.Utilities down 0.6%. U.S. PCE price index rose 0.3% in September. Praxis Precision Medicines Inc soared 31%.
data.description: Midway through trading, U.S. stocks saw an increase, notably with the Nasdaq Composite rising by approximately 0.2% on Friday. The Dow climbed by 0.17% to reach 47,933.71, while the NASDAQ saw a 0.16% increase to hit 23,543.03. The S&P 500 also experienced a rise, gaining 0.15% to reach 6,867.40. Communication services shares notably surged by 0.9%, while utilities stocks fell by 0.6%. In economic news, the U.S. PCE price index saw a 0.3% month-over-month increase in September, aligning with market expectations. In company developments, Praxis Precision Medicines Inc (NASDAQ: PRAX) saw a significant spike in shares by 31% to $248.00 following the announcement of successful completion of its pre-NDA meeting with the FDA and obtaining alignment from the agency. The company also disclosed results from the EMBOLD study.

data.title: American Nurses Assoc. supports evidence-based immunizations post-CDC vote on Hepatitis B vaccine, emphasizing protection for infants and communities.
data.description: The American Nurses Association (ANA) emphasizes the importance of evidence-based decision-making and policies aimed at safeguarding the well-being of infants, families, and communities. In a statement released on Dec. 5, 2025, in Silver Spring, Md., ANA reiterated its staunch advocacy for immunizations as a critical measure in preserving health. This reaffirmation underscores the organization's commitment to prioritizing the health of individuals, with a specific focus on ensuring the protection of vulnerable populations. ANA's support for immunizations aligns with its dedication to promoting public health initiatives and underscores the role of vaccines in preventing disease spread. As the advocacy group continues its advocacy efforts, it underscores the significance of evidence-based approaches in policymaking to support the well-being of communities.

data.title: Buona offers freebies if Bears win: 'Good. Better. Best.' deal at all locations in Chicago for Sunday's game.
data.description: Buona, the original Italian beef provider in Chicago, is running a promotion called "Good. Better. Best." offering a freebie if the Bears win their upcoming football game. The promotion is applicable at all Buona locations in Chicago. The Bears are set to face off against a rival team this Sunday, and Buona is confident in supporting the local team with this offer.

data.title: Stock market near highs; Netflix to buy Warner Bros, MongoDB, American Eagle earnings movers. - Investors' Business Daily
data.description: Stock prices continued to rise as the market reached near record levels. Notable earnings movers for the week included MongoDB, American Eagle, and Snowflake. In a significant development, Netflix announced its plans to acquire Warner Bros. This summary was part of the Investor's Business Daily weekly review focusing on key companies and market trends.

data.title: EWNJ awards $35,000 in scholarships to 7 top grad students, promoting academic excellence & leadership in NJ.
data.description: The organization Executive Women of New Jersey (EWNJ) in Florham Park, N.J., recognized academic excellence and leadership skills among promising leaders in New Jersey on Dec. 2, 2025. EWNJ, a prominent group for female executives in the state, granted a total of $35,000 in scholarships to seven exceptional individuals.

data.title: Dr. Scott Kamelle Scholarship offers $1,000 to US undergrads and pre-med students to foster healthcare innovation.
data.description: Milwaukee - As of December 5, 2025, the Dr. Scott Kamelle Scholarship is now open for applications from committed undergraduate and pre-medical students in the United States. Founded by Gynecologic Oncologist Dr. Scott Kamelle, this scholarship grants an annual prize of $1,000 to acknowledge outstanding academic achievement. The scholarship aims to support students pursuing their educational goals and making a positive impact in the medical field.

data.title: Dreame Technology makes Fast Company's Brands That Matter list in Global category, recognizing cultural significance.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, Dreame Technology (Dreame) proudly announced its selection in Fast Company's prestigious annual Brands That Matter list in the Global category. These awards celebrate brands that have demonstrated cultural significance and strong connections with customers. Dreame's recognition highlights its success in standing out among competitors and resonating with consumers on a profound level. The inclusion in this list signifies Dreame's achievement and influence in the industry, showcasing its commitment to innovation and customer engagement.

data.title: Stay informed on price trends for various commodities like rice, wheat, pulses, spices in Indian markets. Comprehensive data included.
data.description: A new report titled "All India Agricultural Commodities Market Intelligence Subscription" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report focuses on Indian Agricultural Markets and covers various commodities such as rice, wheat, maize, six major pulses, three oilseeds, three vegetable oils, two oilmeals, sugar, cotton, six major spices, feed ingredients, guarseed, guar gum, and castorseed. It provides detailed information including prices and market trends for these commodities in India.
